description: As part of the OLPC CS Curriculum Steganography Lab, produce two Python scripts in /home/ga/Documents/ named encode.py and decode.py that implement LSB steganography for ASCII P3 PPM images. The implementation must skip the four-token PPM header, use 8-bit MSB-first encoding, and employ a Null byte terminator. Use encode.py to embed the message "OLPC CS Curriculum: Steganography Lab" from /home/ga/Documents/cover_image.ppm into /home/ga/Documents/stego_image.ppm. The decode.py script must accept a file path as a command-line argument and print only the decoded message to standard output. Do not use external libraries like PIL/Pillow.
